tags.description: Mt. Hollywood Drive is open to bicycles, hikers, horses. The road is paved but there are several bad portions. Public vehicles are not allowed. Often there are film crew vehicles on this road with permits. Locked gates at each end.
tags.name: Mount Hollywood Drive
